raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is within the right arm workspace and its sides are unobstructed, allowing the claw to approach from the side.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted slightly above the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table_front_right_clear_area",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the chosen region on the front-right corner of the table is free of objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is placed on the designated area of the table and released, leaving it out of the manipulation workspace of the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup has been removed. The right face of box_2 is clear of obstacles, and there is free space on the table to the right to accommodate the lateral displacement.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is shifted ~10 cm to the right, creating a gap between box_1 and box_2 large enough for the robot to insert both arms around box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A sufficient gap exists on both sides of box_1 after moving box_2. Both arms can approach the left and right faces of box_1 without interference.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted several centimeters above the tabletop, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is within the right arm workspace and its sides are unobstructed, allowing the claw to approach from the side.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted slightly above the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the chosen region on the front-right corner of the table is free of objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is placed on the designated area of the table and released, leaving it out of the manipulation workspace of the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup has been removed. The right face of box_2 is clear of obstacles, and there is free space on the table to the right to accommodate the lateral displacement.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is shifted ~10 cm to the right, creating a gap between box_1 and box_2 large enough for the robot to insert both arms around box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: A sufficient gap exists on both sides of box_1 after moving box_2. Both arms can approach the left and right faces of box_1 without interference.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted several centimeters above the tabletop, completing the pick-up task.
